form:FormGroup.label: Base URL (optional)
form:FormGroup.helpText: The URL of the AI service

g:TextBox.title: Override the URL for the vector embeddings endpoint. Example: https://model-server.example.com/v1

form:FormGroup.label: API Key (optional)
form:FormGroup.helpText: Select the API key to use if needed

form:FormGroup.label: Model ID
form:FormGroup.helpText: Specify the model identity to use

g:TextBox.title: ID of the model to use to generate embeddings. Example: intfloat/e5-mistral-7b-instruct

form:FormGroup.label: Maximum context window tokens
form:FormGroup.helpText: Specify the maximum number of tokens to be used for the context window

v:ValueSpinner.title: Maximum number of tokens allowed in the model's context window. Set to zero to disable.

form:FormGroup.label: Reasoning Effort (optional)
form:FormGroup.helpText: Controls reasoning depth for models that support it (e.g. OpenAI o-series). Values: low, medium, high. Leave blank for default.

g:TextBox.title: Reasoning effort level: low, medium, or high. Leave blank if the model does not support reasoning.

form:FormGroup.label: Embedding model dimensions
form:FormGroup.helpText: Specify the number of dimensions to use for embedding models. Lucene has a max of 1024 but Elastic can handle 4096. Set to zero to disable and allow models to use their default.

v:ValueSpinner.title: Number of dimensions to use for embedding models.
